channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Safari's latest trick could be automatically organizing your tabs into groups
item.description: Bloomberg's Mark Gurman said Apple could introduce Organize Tabs feature with the next major software update.

item.title: Ce chargeur rapide double port Google 67W spécialement adapté aux smartphones Pixel profite d’une belle promo à -41%
item.description: Le Google Pixel Flex Double Port 67W est un chargeur avec deux ports USB-C capable de charger rapidement vos appareils, notamment les produits Google, mais aussi les autres. Il est à retrouver pour 38,57 euros au lieu de 64,99 euros sur Amazon.

item.title: AI tool poisoning exposes a major flaw in enterprise agent security
item.description: AI agents choose tools from shared registries by matching natural-language descriptions. But no human is verifying whether those descriptions are true. I discovered this gap when I filed Issue #141 in the CoSAI secure-ai-tooling repository. I assumed it would be treated as a single risk entry. The repository maintainer saw it differently and split my submission into two separate issues: One covering selection-time threats (tool impersonation, metadata manipulation); the other covering execution-time threats (behavioral drift, runtime contract violation). That confirmed tool registry poisoning ...

item.title: Ashnymph’s Childhood EP is exhilarating dance goth rock
item.description: I've got to thank my oldest friend and concert buddy, Tim, for turning me on to this one. Ashnymph is a London band that blends post-punk melodies with Krautrock rhythms and industrial grime. Their debut EP, Childhood, drifts between dreamy vocals buried in layers of reverb and four-on-the-floor dancefloor pounding. It's a thrilling opening salvo […]...

item.title: Liquid Glass tweaks are reportedly coming in the next macOS
item.description: The changes are meant to improve legibility issues with lists and text-heavy areas.

item.title: A new Subnautica 2 gameplay trailer just dropped ahead of its Early Access release
item.description: Subnautica 2 will be available in Early Access on May 14.

item.title: TechCrunch Mobility: Lime’s IPO gamble
item.description: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility, your hub for the future of transportation and now, more than ever, how AI is playing a part.

item.title: How to watch Barcelona vs Real Madrid: Live Streams & TV Channels for El Clasico 2025/26
item.description: We'll show you how to watch Barcelona vs Real Madrid live streams from anywhere in the world with Los Blancos needing El Clasico win to keep title hopes alive.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy A37 vs Nothing Phone (4a) : comment choisir le meilleur téléphone milieu de gamme ?
item.description: Samsung vend des palettes entières de ses Galaxy A tous les ans, mais la concurrence est plus féroce que jamais. Au même niveau de prix, le Nothing Phone (4a) a tout d'un rival de poids. Lequel faut-il préférer ?
